---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability, workflow, or UX improvement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: [enhancement]
---

## Problem Or Opportunity

What is missing, slow, awkward, or hard to do today?

## Proposed Change

Describe the feature or improvement you want.

## Why It Matters

Who benefits and what workflow gets better?

## Possible Scope

Keep this as concrete as possible:

- commands
- settings
- views or panels
- docs
- release impact

## Additional Context

Examples, mockups, prior art, or related issues.
